---
title: "The Brain Rotates Memories to Save Them"
description: "How does the brain prevent sensory information from interfering with memory, efficiently?"
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-04-25"
categories: [neuroscience, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![The Brain Rotates Memories. Image from [Quanta Magazine](https://www.quantamagazine.org/the-brain-rotates-memories-to-save-them-from-new-sensations-20210415/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

How do brains prevent sensory information from interfering with memory, *efficiently*?

Nature is the grand master of engineering!

Paper: <https://www.nature.com/articles/s41593-021-00821-9>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_the-brain-rotates-memories-to-save-them-activity-6792345323093278720-jSxW).*
